events.title: Vinyasa Yoga
events.description: Creative form of yoga where poses are linked together with the breath in a flowing sequence

events.title: Mama & Baby Yoga
events.description: To make a connection to your inner self and baby.

events.title: Full Beach Yoga Day
events.description: One full day full of yoga, meditation and fully the attention to your inner self located at the beach.

events.title: Sound and Vibrational Bath
events.description: Immerse yourself in a transformative experience where ancient and modern instruments harmonize to create a powerful soundscape.

events.title: Meditation and Mindfullness
events.description: Mindfulness teaches you the skill of paying attention to the present by noticing when your mind wanders off.

events.title: Cacao Concert
events.description: An enchanting evening where cacao, heavenly music, and restorative yoga intertwine in a blissful journey of relaxation and surrender.

events.title: Inner Growth and Authentic Relationships
events.description: A transformative life coaching group designed to guide you on a journey of self-discovery and meaningful connections.

events.title: Deepen your Breathwork
events.description: You will learn how to recognise the state of your nervous system and how to apply conscious connected breathwork in a way that is appropriate for you.
